criteria.text: Press Space while playing -> playback stops, playhead stays at current position (does not jump to beat 1)
criteria.reason: True playhead-position retention can only be observed in a running Ableton Live instance via OSC. The OSC command mapping that produces this behavior (pause -> /live/song/stop_playing, which Live does NOT rewind) is pinned headlessly by issue-30-c5.

criteria.text: Press Space again -> playback resumes from the paused position
criteria.reason: Resume-from-position is an Ableton Live runtime behavior. The OSC mapping (play -> /live/song/continue_playing, not start_playing) is pinned headlessly by issue-30-c5.

criteria.text: Stamping mid-song, pausing, and resuming preserves timeline position throughout
criteria.reason: End-to-end mid-song stamp + pause + resume requires a running Ableton Live session; verified in manual smoke.

criteria.text: Existing play-from-beginning behavior (if needed) is accessible via a separate control or is intentionally removed
criteria.test_id: issue-30-c4: a separate return-to-start control exists and rewinds the playhead to beat 0

criteria.text: OSC command mapping implements pause-in-place: pause sends stop_playing (no rewind) and play sends continue_playing (resume from position), not start_playing
criteria.test_id: issue-30-c5: pausePlaying sends stop_playing and continuePlaying sends continue_playing
